properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: (Male vocal) There’s the bridegroom waiting for His beautiful bride And finally she’s coming walking up the aisle And the love that’s shining in his eyes Cannot be described He's filled with joy inside As he beholds his lovely bride

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (Female vocal) She can hardly take her breath With every step she takes to him She can hardly believe it’s happening She’s uniting with her king For a long, long time she’s waited For their wedding day to come And her joy is overwhelming As she comes to meet her love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Finally, The waiting time is over And uniting time has come Finally, They’ll no longer be apart This is a tie no man can sever For before the world began They were one in God’s plan

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: (Male vocal) With his eyes he promises she’ll never regret He’ll make sure that she’s happy For her he’d give his last breath (Female vocal And with her smile she’s telling him That she will always care Through happiness or sorrow She’ll always be there

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The crowd disappears °They’re lost in their love They’re entranced by each other And time is no more

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Finally The waiting time is over And uniting time has come Finally They’ll no longer be apart This is a tie no man can sever For before the world began Before there was an atom They were one in God’s plan They were joined by the potter’s hand And what God has joined together No man can put asunder La la la la la la la la la la la la la la
